summary: Completed frontend testing of reported issues. FIXED: Carousel dark screen issue - transitions now smooth with proper z-index. FIXED: Add to Cart functionality - buttons now present and working on product pages. ISSUE: Admin login not working in frontend despite backend API being functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Admin login form submits but stays on login page instead of redirecting to admin dashboard
ui_bugs.impact: Admin users cannot access admin dashboard through UI

integration_issues.issue: Frontend login form not properly handling admin authentication response

passed_tests: Product card navigation to detail pages
Add to Cart buttons present on product pages
Cart page display and item management
Cart item count badge in header

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (Major issues fixed: carousel and cart. Only admin login failing)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin login frontend integration. The backend admin login API is working (confirmed in backend tests), but the frontend login form is not properly handling the authentication response or redirecting to admin dashboard. Check login form submission handling and authentication state management.
